title: Unrecraft
body:
This modpack adds realistic and horror elements. Made for singleplayer survival.

**Major Survival Changes**

Torch emmits light while being held, done with Lamb Dynamic Lights

Better Combat makes it so that you can't span click and your sword swings arcross the screen

Trees fall after breaking the same log a few times with HT's Treechop

When at low health, or low hunger, visable changes on screen appear without the use of hud elements with Enhanced Visuals

**Realistic Elements**

Adds Ambience in the world, done with Ambient Sounds, Falling leaves and other mods

Visable player model thaks to First Person Model

Camera Overhaul makes the camera roll left, right or lean foward and backward when moving that direction

3D models for doors, crafting tables, furnaces and other blocks

Immersive portals lets you see into the nether when looking through nether portals

**Horror Elements**

Herobrine teleports behind you and can replace torches with redstone torches but he can't damage you

Blood can appear on your screen when at low health and the game gets desauterated when at low hunger

Ambient enviornments

Mobs bleed and fracture upon death

**Other**

Check resource pack menu, activate all the ones you want, you might not want to apply with others

No FOV effects

No shaders

**Conclusion**

This is one of the funnest modpacks I've ever played. Other realistic modpacks use mods like EarlyGame, where getting wood is such a difficult task. I spent a lot of time fine tuning the experience. Hope you Enjoy!
